task_completion.description: Locate flight plans belonging to the operator 'SkyHigh Surveyors'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list, table, or search result in the application GUI showing flight plans filtered or searched by the operator name 'SkyHigh Surveyors'.

task_completion.description: Identify the flight plans that occurred in October 2023
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application GUI displaying flight plans with dates specifically in October 2023 (e.g., Oct 5 and Oct 12).

task_completion.description: View the details or times of the relevant flights to calculate duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the start and end times (e.g., 10:00-10:45 and 14:00-15:30) or the specific durations of the October 2023 flights.

task_completion.description: Open or create the utilization report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window open with the file path '/home/ga/Documents/utilization_report.txt' visible.

task_completion.description: Save the correct total flight duration to the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '135' (or a value between 133 and 137) typed into the text editor or terminal command destined for the utilization_report.txt file.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to find the flight information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a graphical application to view flight plans, rather than just running backend database queries or scripts in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the necessary flight details before writing the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent opening the specific flight records for October 2023 to see their times/durations before the final answer is written.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or wrote to the file using standard tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using a text editor (like nano, gedit, etc.) or a standard terminal command (like echo) to write the result, rather than executing a pre-existing script to do it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct total flight duration for 'SkyHigh Surveyors' in October 2023 is 135 minutes (acceptable tolerance: 133-137 minutes). This is calculated from two flights: Flight 1 on Oct 5 (10:00-10:45, 45 mins) and Flight 2 on Oct 12 (14:00-15:30, 90 mins). Distractor flights (wrong operator or wrong month) must be excluded. The final result must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/utilization_report.txt.
